source_pr.title: store/tikv/mock-tikv: add coprocessor support.
source_pr.body: As mockTiKV currently is much slower than `localstore` and do not support store data on disk, currently only `executor` package is set to use mockTikv. `localstore` should still be used for a while.

symptoms: executor: address comment and fix a race bug.
failure_signature: executor: address comment and fix a race bug.
root_cause_explanation: The tests were flaky due to reliance on an external TiKV-like environment. This PR stabilizes them by enhancing MockTiKV (adding coprocessor support and a convenient NewMockTikvStore) so tests can run against a deterministic in-memory mock rather than a real cluster.
fix_pattern: Use MockTiKV with coprocessor support (e.g., NewMockTikvStore) in tests to avoid real TiKV dependency.

evidence: evidence: executor: address comment and fix a race bug.

files: executor/executor_test.go, store/tikv/coprocessor.go, store/tikv/kv.go, store/tikv/mock-tikv/cop_handler.go, store/tikv/mock-tikv/mvcc.go, store/tikv/mock-tikv/rpc.go, store/tikv/scan_mock_test.go, store/tikv/ticlient_test.go, executor/executor_xapi.go, xapi/xapi.go, store/tikv/lock_test.go
